title: invoice — declared entitlements
description: Nine entitlement keys. `invoice_capture` is the boolean master gate. `invoice_slot_per_month` caps invoice creation per rolling calendar month. `invoice_custom_series` (Medium+) unlocks tenant-configurable series (INV / SO / RECEIPT). `invoice_multi_currency` (Medium+) allows invoices in currencies other than tenant.default_currency. `invoice_tenant_branded_pdf` (Medium+) applies the tenant's branding to the invoice PDF. `invoice_dunning_advanced` (Enterprise) unlocks custom dunning cadences + collection agency integration. `invoice_collections_integration` (Enterprise) enables third-party collections API dispatch. `invoice_extended_retention` (Enterprise) extends retention from 7 → 10 years. `credit_note_issuance` (Small+) enables credit note creation for refunds/adjustments.

entitlements.description: Master feature gate. Off = the whole module is invisible: no invoice CRUD, no credit-note issuance, no reports. All tiers get this on (invoicing is a foundational feature) — differentiation lives in the finer-grained gates below.
enforcedBy: entitlement.enforce:invoice_capture middleware on every /api/v1/invoices/* route + /api/v1/credit-notes/* route + /api/v1/reports/* route
InvoiceObserver refuses creating when the gate is closed
SDUI invoice surfaces hidden when features array does not include 'invoice.core'

entitlements.description: How many invoices a tenant may create per rolling calendar month. Small: 100, Medium: 1000, Enterprise: unlimited. Resets on the 1st of each calendar month via a scheduled reset job in the entitlements module. Consumed on invoice.creating; excess creations return 402.
enforcedBy: InvoiceObserver.creating consumes 1 unit via EntitlementGate::consume('invoice_slot_per_month'); refuses with INVOICE_QUOTA_EXCEEDED when cap reached

entitlements.description: Enables tenant-configurable invoice_series values (INV / SO / RECEIPT / custom 3-8 char slug). Small tenants get 'INV' only. Medium+ can set the series per invoice AND configure the default via settings.
enforcedBy: InvoiceObserver.creating refuses when invoice_series != 'INV' AND gate is closed
SDUI series field disabled when gate is closed

entitlements.description: Enables invoices in currencies other than tenant.default_currency. Small tenants must invoice in their default currency; Medium+ can invoice in any ISO 4217 currency (currency frozen at issuance).
enforcedBy: InvoiceObserver.creating refuses when currency != tenant.default_currency AND gate is closed

entitlements.description: Enables the tenant's branding (logo, colors, footer) on invoice PDFs via the branding module. Small tenants get the default Academorix-branded PDF template.
enforcedBy: InvoicePDFRenderer checks the gate + selects template accordingly
SDUI branding preview disabled when gate is closed

entitlements.description: Enterprise-only. Enables custom dunning cadence configuration (override the default day+3/7/14/30/60 schedule) + collection-agency integration. Small + Medium get the default cadence only.
enforcedBy: DunningScheduler reads config only when the gate is open; otherwise applies the defaults
SDUI dunning-config screen hidden when gate is closed

entitlements.description: Enterprise-only. Enables third-party collections API dispatch (via the collections integration in the notifications module). Small + Medium tenants can mark invoices sent-to-collections manually but do not get automated agency handoff.
enforcedBy: EscalateDunningToCollectionsJob refuses when the gate is closed
SDUI 'send to collections' button hidden when gate is closed

entitlements.description: Enterprise-only. Extends invoices + credit_notes + invoice_lines retention from 7 years (default) to 10 years. For finance regimes that require longer ad-spend audit trails (some US states, UK VAT with adjustments).
enforcedBy: PurgeExpiredInvoiceDataJob checks the gate + applies 10-year retention when set

entitlements.description: Master feature gate for the credit note surface. All tiers get this — credit notes are foundational (regulators require them for VAT invoicing). Off = the /credit-notes routes 404 + CreditNoteObserver refuses creates.
enforcedBy: CreditNoteObserver.creating refuses when gate is closed
